hero.label: AI-Powered Cinema
hero.title: Where AI Meets {accent}
hero.description: We craft compelling visual narratives using cutting-edge artificial intelligence. Every frame intentional, every story unforgettable.

home.featuredDesc: Our latest productions, crafted with AI precision and artistic vision.
home.visionP1: AIM Studio stands at the intersection of technology and art. We leverage the most advanced AI tools to create films that challenge perceptions, evoke emotions, and push the boundaries of visual storytelling.
home.visionP2: From script to screen, our AI-enhanced pipeline enables us to craft cinematic experiences that would traditionally require massive budgets and large crews, delivered with unprecedented speed and creative control.
home.limitlessDesc: No boundaries, no gatekeepers. AI unlocks storytelling at a scale and depth that was once reserved for massive studios.
home.cinematicDesc: Every frame is intentional. Every cut is precise. Our AI pipeline delivers cinematic quality at unprecedented speed.

donate.quote: Great films aren't made by studios alone they're made by communities who dare to dream together.

footer.tagline: Pioneering the future of cinema through artificial intelligence. Every frame crafted, every story told.
footer.newsletterText: Get notified about new releases and casting opportunities.
footer.subscribed: You're subscribed! We'll keep you posted.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: We Make Films.
about.heroSubtitle: AIM Studio is where AI-powered cinema comes to life. We showcase our productions and invite the global community to create, learn, and grow alongside us.
about.philosophyQuote: Great films aren't made in isolation. We build in the open, every production, every tool, every opportunity shared with a community that believes AI can amplify human creativity, not replace it.
about.milestone1Desc: AIM Studio launched with a mission: create AI-powered films and share the entire process with the world. Not just a studio, a movement.
about.milestone2Desc: Released our first AI-assisted productions. Opened casting calls globally, proving that talent has no borders when technology bridges the gap.
about.milestone3Desc: Launched the full platform with training hub, casting system, and community tools. Creators from 30+ countries now learn, audition, and collaborate here.
about.innovationDesc: Every film, short, and project we produce lives here. Watch our AI-powered productions and see what's possible when technology meets storytelling.
about.inclusivityDesc: This isn't a solo act. Join casting calls, contribute your talent, learn new skills in our training hub, and be part of productions that reach a global audience.
about.authenticityDesc: No expensive equipment needed. No gatekeepers. If you have passion and creativity, AIM Studio gives you the tools and the stage to make it happen.
about.ctaDesc: Whether you want to watch our latest productions, audition for a role, or learn AI-powered filmmaking, your journey starts here.
about.missionText: AIM Studio exists to showcase what happens when artificial intelligence meets cinematic storytelling and to build it all with the community. Every production we release, every tool we build, every opportunity we create is designed to be shared.
about.storyText:
We're not a traditional studio behind closed doors. We create AI-powered films, shorts, and visual experiences and we do it in the open. Our casting calls reach creators in 30+ countries. Our training hub teaches real skills. Our platform is where the community watches, learns, and joins the process.

This is cinema built together. Your talent, your creativity, powered by AI. Welcome to AIM Studio.

castingForm.basicsDesc: Tell us a bit about yourself. All fields marked with * are required.
castingForm.aboutPlaceholder: A little about you, your background, interests, or anything you'd like us to know. All levels are welcome!
castingForm.skillsPlaceholder: e.g., Martial arts, singing, accents, dance, horseback riding...
castingForm.personalityTitle: Tell us who you really are
castingForm.personalityDesc: We want to understand the person behind the performer. There are no wrong answers, be yourself.
castingForm.whyPlaceholder: Tell us what sparks your interest...
castingForm.dreamPlaceholder: A genre, character type, or scenario...
castingForm.photosDesc: Upload 4 to 6 photos so we can see the full range of your appearance. These photos help our team and AI maintain character consistency throughout the production.
castingForm.photosTip: Each photo must be under 10MB. JPG, PNG, or WebP accepted. Good lighting and a clean background work best.
castingForm.frontDesc: Clear, well-lit photo of your face straight-on
castingForm.sideDesc: Left or right side profile view
castingForm.expressionDesc: Smiling, serious, or emotional expression of your choice
castingForm.additionalDesc1: Action pose, close-up, or creative photo
castingForm.additionalDesc2: Another angle or look you want to showcase
castingForm.voiceDesc: Upload a voice recording so we can match your unique sound to the perfect character, and share where we can find you online.
castingForm.socialDesc: Provide at least one social media link or username
castingForm.reviewDesc: Please review the agreements below and check each box to submit your application.
castingForm.name: Name:
castingForm.consent1: I give AIM Studio a permanent, irrevocable right to use my photos, voice, video, and submissions for this project and its promotion. This includes AI-generated content using my likeness. This right remains even if I leave the project.
castingForm.consent2: I understand my participation is voluntary with no pay unless agreed in writing. I waive any future claims over materials I submit or content made during my involvement.
castingForm.consent3: I confirm my information is accurate. My contact details can be removed on request, but all production content and materials from my involvement belong to AIM Studio permanently.
castingForm.invalidImage: Please upload an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.)
castingForm.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
castingForm.friendlyUploadError: Oops! We had a little trouble uploading your files. Please check your internet connection and try again — your info is still saved!
castingForm.photoFrontDesc: Clear, well-lit photo of your face straight-on
castingForm.photoSideDesc: Left or right side profile view
castingForm.photoExpressionDesc: Smiling, serious, or emotional expression of your choice
castingForm.photoOptional1Desc: Action pose, close-up, or creative photo
castingForm.photoOptional2Desc: Another angle or look you want to showcase
castingForm.savedMediaFound: We found your saved media from a previous application.
castingForm.savedPhotosWarning: Using your saved photos. Tap Upload New Photos to change them.
castingForm.savedAudioWarning: Using your saved voice recording. Tap Record New to change it.
castingForm.savedPhotosReady: Your saved photos are ready to submit.
castingForm.savedAudioReady: Your saved recording is ready to submit.
castingForm.applyInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
castingForm.applyAlreadyApplied: You've already applied for this role! You can apply for other roles. Check your email ({email}) for confirmation.
castingForm.applyTooManyToday: You've submitted too many applications today. Please try again tomorrow. This limit ensures fair review for all applicants.
castingForm.applyClosed: This role has reached its maximum number of applications. The casting team is reviewing current submissions.
castingForm.applyNotFound: This casting call is not found or is no longer accepting applications.

scripts.metaDesc: Submit your screenplay for a chance to have it produced by AIM Studio.
scripts.heroDesc: We're looking for original screenplays. Submit your script and our creative team will review it for production potential. The best scripts get produced by AIM Studio.
scripts.noCompensation: No financial compensation · Credit & portfolio opportunity
scripts.step1Desc: Upload your screenplay in PDF or Final Draft format through the open call form.
scripts.step2Desc: Our creative team reviews your script for structure, originality, and production feasibility.
scripts.step3Desc: Selected scripts enter production at AIM Studio with full creative credit.
scripts.closedDesc: Script submissions are not currently open. Check back soon for upcoming calls.
scripts.noCallsDesc: There are no active script calls at the moment. Subscribe to be notified when new calls open.
scripts.notifyConfirmedDesc: We'll notify you the moment this call opens.

scripts.formSynopsisPlaceholder: Full synopsis of your story (beginning, middle, end)...

scripts.formErrorMax: Maximum submissions reached for this call.
scripts.disclaimerItem1: No financial compensation - this is a credit & portfolio opportunity.
scripts.disclaimerItem2: Your script will be reviewed by our creative team for production potential.
scripts.disclaimerItem3: The top 3 scripts will be reviewed by our creative team.
scripts.disclaimerItem4: Selected scripts may be adapted for studio film production.
scripts.disclaimerItem5: You retain full authorship credit on any produced work.

notFound.title: Scene Not Found
notFound.desc: Looks like this scene didn't make the final cut. The page you're looking for may have been moved, renamed, or is still in pre-production.

scriptStatus_shortlisted.subject: Your Script Has Been Shortlisted ⭐
scriptStatus_shortlisted.heading: Your Script Made the Shortlist!
scriptStatus_shortlisted.body: Excellent news! Your screenplay has impressed our creative team and has been shortlisted for production consideration. We will be in touch soon with next steps.
scriptStatus_shortlisted.label: Shortlisted
scriptStatus_shortlisted.notifMessage: Your screenplay "{title}" has been shortlisted for production consideration.

scriptStatus_selected.subject: 🏆 Your Script Has Been Selected for Production!
scriptStatus_selected.heading: Your Script Is Getting Produced!
scriptStatus_selected.body: Congratulations! We are thrilled to inform you that your screenplay has been selected for production at AIM Studio. Our team will reach out shortly with the next steps and production details.
scriptStatus_selected.label: Selected for Production
scriptStatus_selected.notifMessage: Congratulations! Your screenplay "{title}" has been selected for production.

scriptStatus_rejected.subject: An Update on Your Script Submission
scriptStatus_rejected.heading: Thank You for Your Submission
scriptStatus_rejected.body: Thank you for submitting your screenplay to AIM Studio. After thorough review, we have decided to go in a different direction for this call. We truly value your creative work and strongly encourage you to submit to future calls.
scriptStatus_rejected.label: Not Selected
scriptStatus_rejected.notifMessage: We have an update on your screenplay submission "{title}".
